## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Andy Haley to discuss potential collaboration and career opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is a rapidly growing, AI-driven content marketing company closing its Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Andy Haley has extensive experience in SEO and e-commerce, particularly with major appliance brands](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [fwd.digital is hiring for managing director roles, seeking experienced professionals to lead client accounts and contribute to company growth](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest in potential collaboration, with alignment on career goals and company direction](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [fwd.digital is closing its Series A funding round](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Company has experienced rapid growth, publishing 20 million words per month](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Utilizes AI-driven workflows and a runtime layer to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Hiring aggressively, including 25 engineers and key leadership roles](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### Andy Haley's Experience

  - [Currently at Razorfish since 2017, working primarily with Whirlpool brands](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Developed SEO programs from basic technical work to large-scale content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Manages 1500+ articles across three brands, outperforming competitors](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Hybrid role combining SEO director and account director responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach and Technology

  - [Built AI workflows as code to automate and scale content production processes](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Focuses on delivering outcomes rather than just tools or agency services](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Combines AI automation with human expertise for high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Iterative approach to improving workflows based on real-world application](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Role Discussion and Company Structure

  - [Seeking managing directors to own client relationships, grow accounts, and contribute to company strategy](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Emphasis on hiring diverse talent with experience from various backgrounds (agency, client-side, startups)](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Hybrid roles encouraged, combining client management, strategy, and hands-on work](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Career Aspirations and Compensation

  - [Andy expressed interest in faster-paced environments and new challenges](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Desire to move further into strategy and client interaction roles](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Compensation discussion: Andy seeking upper hundreds (around $200k)](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers competitive base salary, bonus structure, equity, and potential revenue share](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Andy to Kyle (likely another team member)](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up conversation to discuss role and opportunity in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [fwd.digital to provide more information on compensation structure, including bonus and equity details](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Explore potential for Andy to lead e-commerce initiatives within fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/enJ29-eS-f9oy9kkvaUeUSZQPLs5u6Pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
